subject: Re: WarpTools ts_export_particles failes with half of the tilt series
body:
Hi Arsen,
I never heard back from Juha so could not investigate further. Could you please provide some more information like the commands you used, whether those TS are different in any way? (Lots of contamination? Particularly bad tracking?)
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Dec 1, 2024, at 08:14, 'Arsen Petrovic' via Warp <warp-em@googlegroups.com> wrote:
﻿
Hi all,
I have the same problem. Did someone find the solution?
Thanks a lot!
Best,
Arsen
On Friday, October 18, 2024 at 9:02:35 AM UTC+2 juha.hu...@gmail.com wrote:
Hello,
I am running WarpTools ts_export_particles.  For some reason, 15/31 tilt series fail.  The tomogram reconstruction and template matching steps work fine for all 31.  Any suggestions on what to check? 
The command and output are below.
WarpTools ts_export_particles \
--settings warp_tiltseries.settings \
--input_directory warp_tiltseries/matching \
--input_pattern "*run_class001_clean.star" \
--normalized_coords \
--output_processing relion_new2 \
--output_star relion_new2/matching.star \
--output_angpix 9.62 \
--box 64 \
--diameter 300 \
--relative_output_paths \
--2d
Running command ts_export_particles with:
input_star = null
input_directory = warp_tiltseries/matching
input_pattern = *run_class001_clean.star
coords_angpix = null
